title: URDF-Anything: Constructing Articulated Objects with 3D Multimodal Language Model
summary: Constructing accurate digital twins of articulated objects is essential for robotic simulation training and embodied AI world model building, yet historically requires painstaking manual modeling or multi-stage pipelines. In this work, we propose \textbf{URDF-Anything}, an end-to-end automatic reconstruction framework based on a 3D multimodal large language model (MLLM). URDF-Anything utilizes an autoregressive prediction framework based on point-cloud and text multimodal input to jointly optimize geometric segmentation and kinematic parameter prediction. It implements a specialized $[SEG]$ token mechanism that interacts directly with point cloud features, enabling fine-grained part-level segmentation while maintaining consistency with the kinematic parameter predictions. Experiments on both simulated and real-world datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing approaches regarding geometric segmentation (mIoU 17\% improvement), kinematic parameter prediction (average error reduction of 29\%), and physical executability (surpassing baselines by 50\%). Notably, our method exhibits excellent generalization ability, performing well even on objects outside the training set. This work provides an efficient solution for constructing digital twins for robotic simulation, significantly enhancing the sim-to-real transfer capability.
tldr: The paper introduces URDF-Anything, a 3D multimodal LLM-based framework for automatically constructing digital twins of articulated objects, outperforming existing methods in geometric segmentation, kinematic parameter prediction, and physical executability.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了URDF-Anything，一个基于3D多模态LLM的框架，用于自动构建铰接物体的数字孪生，在几何分割、运动学参数预测和物理可执行性方面优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 构建铰接物体的精确数字孪生对于机器人仿真训练和具身人工智能世界模型构建至关重要，但一直以来都需要费力的人工建模或多阶段流程。在这项工作中，我们提出了 \textbf{URDF-Anything}，一个基于 3D 多模态大型语言模型 (MLLM) 的端到端自动重建框架。URDF-Anything 利用基于点云和文本多模态输入的自回归预测框架，联合优化几何分割和运动学参数预测。它实现了一种专门的 $[SEG]$ 令牌机制，该机制直接与点云特征交互，从而实现细粒度的部件级分割，同时保持与运动学参数预测的一致性。在模拟和真实世界数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法在几何分割（mIoU 提高 17\%）、运动学参数预测（平均误差降低 29\%）和物理可执行性（超过基线 50\%）方面显著优于现有方法。值得注意的是，我们的方法表现出出色的泛化能力，即使在训练集之外的物体上也能表现良好。这项工作为构建机器人仿真的数字孪生提供了一种高效的解决方案，显著提高了从仿真到真实世界的迁移能力。

title: Fast-SmartWay: Panoramic-Free End-to-End Zero-Shot Vision-and-Language Navigation
summary: Recent advances in Vision-and-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments (VLN-CE) have leveraged multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to achieve zero-shot navigation. However, existing methods often rely on panoramic observations and two-stage pipelines involving waypoint predictors, which introduce significant latency and limit real-world applicability. In this work, we propose Fast-SmartWay, an end-to-end zero-shot VLN-CE framework that eliminates the need for panoramic views and waypoint predictors. Our approach uses only three frontal RGB-D images combined with natural language instructions, enabling MLLMs to directly predict actions. To enhance decision robustness, we introduce an Uncertainty-Aware Reasoning module that integrates (i) a Disambiguation Module for avoiding local optima, and (ii) a Future-Past Bidirectional Reasoning mechanism for globally coherent planning. Experiments on both simulated and real-robot environments demonstrate that our method significantly reduces per-step latency while achieving competitive or superior performance compared to panoramic-view baselines. These results demonstrate the practicality and effectiveness of Fast-SmartWay for real-world zero-shot embodied navigation.
tldr: The paper introduces Fast-SmartWay, an end-to-end zero-shot Vision-and-Language Navigation framework that uses only three frontal RGB-D images to enable MLLMs to directly predict actions, improving latency and robustness compared to panoramic-view and waypoint-based methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 Fast-SmartWay，一个端到端零样本视觉语言导航框架，它仅使用三个正面 RGB-D 图像即可使 MLLM 直接预测动作，与全景视图和基于航点的方法相比，提高了延迟和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 在连续环境中的视觉-语言导航(VLN-CE)领域，近期的进展已利用多模态大型语言模型(MLLM)来实现零样本导航。然而，现有方法通常依赖于全景观测和包含航路点预测器的两阶段流程，这导致显著的延迟并限制了其实际应用性。在这项工作中，我们提出Fast-SmartWay，一个端到端的零样本VLN-CE框架，它消除了对全景视图和航路点预测器的需求。我们的方法仅使用三个前置RGB-D图像结合自然语言指令，使MLLM能够直接预测动作。为了增强决策的鲁棒性，我们引入了一种不确定性感知推理模块，该模块集成了(i)一个用于避免局部最优的消歧模块，和(ii)一个用于全局连贯规划的未来-过去双向推理机制。在模拟和真实机器人环境中的实验表明，与全景视图基线相比，我们的方法显著降低了每步延迟，同时实现了具有竞争力或更优越的性能。这些结果证明了Fast-SmartWay在真实世界的零样本具身导航中的实用性和有效性。

title: Maestro: Orchestrating Robotics Modules with Vision-Language Models for Zero-Shot Generalist Robots
summary: Today's best-explored routes towards generalist robots center on collecting ever larger "observations-in actions-out" robotics datasets to train large end-to-end models, copying a recipe that has worked for vision-language models (VLMs). We pursue a road less traveled: building generalist policies directly around VLMs by augmenting their general capabilities with specific robot capabilities encapsulated in a carefully curated set of perception, planning, and control modules. In Maestro, a VLM coding agent dynamically composes these modules into a programmatic policy for the current task and scenario. Maestro's architecture benefits from a streamlined closed-loop interface without many manually imposed structural constraints, and a comprehensive and diverse tool repertoire. As a result, it largely surpasses today's VLA models for zero-shot performance on challenging manipulation skills. Further, Maestro is easily extensible to incorporate new modules, easily editable to suit new embodiments such as a quadruped-mounted arm, and even easily adapts from minimal real-world experiences through local code edits.
tldr: The paper introduces Maestro, a system that uses a VLM coding agent to dynamically compose perception, planning, and control modules for zero-shot generalist robotics, outperforming existing VLA models.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Maestro，一个使用VLM编码代理动态组合感知、规划和控制模块的系统，用于零样本通用机器人技术，其性能优于现有的VLA模型。
summary_zh: 当前探索通用机器人最优路径的方法主要集中于收集越来越大的“观察-行动”机器人数据集，以训练大型端到端模型，复制了视觉语言模型（VLM）的成功经验。 我们另辟蹊径：通过将特定机器人能力封装在一组精心设计的感知、规划和控制模块中，以此增强视觉语言模型的通用能力，从而直接围绕视觉语言模型构建通用策略。 在Maestro中，一个视觉语言模型编码代理动态地将这些模块组合成适用于当前任务和场景的程序化策略。 Maestro的架构受益于精简的闭环接口（无需手动施加过多结构性约束）以及全面且多样化的工具库。 因此，它在具有挑战性的操作技能的零样本性能方面，大大优于当前的视觉语言行为（VLA）模型。 此外，Maestro易于扩展以整合新的模块，易于编辑以适应新的机器人形态（例如安装在四足机器人上的机械臂），甚至可以通过局部代码编辑，从极少的真实世界经验中轻松适应。

title: GauDP: Reinventing Multi-Agent Collaboration through Gaussian-Image Synergy in Diffusion Policies
summary: Recently, effective coordination in embodied multi-agent systems has remained a fundamental challenge, particularly in scenarios where agents must balance individual perspectives with global environmental awareness. Existing approaches often struggle to balance fine-grained local control with comprehensive scene understanding, resulting in limited scalability and compromised collaboration quality. In this paper, we present GauDP, a novel Gaussian-image synergistic representation that facilitates scalable, perception-aware imitation learning in multi-agent collaborative systems. Specifically, GauDP constructs a globally consistent 3D Gaussian field from decentralized RGB observations, then dynamically redistributes 3D Gaussian attributes to each agent's local perspective. This enables all agents to adaptively query task-critical features from the shared scene representation while maintaining their individual viewpoints. This design facilitates both fine-grained control and globally coherent behavior without requiring additional sensing modalities (e.g., 3D point cloud). We evaluate GauDP on the RoboFactory benchmark, which includes diverse multi-arm manipulation tasks. Our method achieves superior performance over existing image-based methods and approaches the effectiveness of point-cloud-driven methods, while maintaining strong scalability as the number of agents increases.
tldr: The paper introduces GauDP, a novel Gaussian-image representation for multi-agent collaboration in robotics, enabling scalable and perception-aware imitation learning by dynamically redistributing 3D Gaussian attributes from a global scene representation to individual agents.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 GauDP，一种用于机器人多智能体协作的新型高斯图像表示，通过将 3D 高斯属性从全局场景表示动态地重新分配给各个智能体，从而实现可扩展的、感知感知的模仿学习。
summary_zh:
摘要：
近来，具身多智能体系统中有效协调仍然是一个根本性挑战，尤其是在智能体必须平衡个体视角与全局环境感知的场景中。现有的方法通常难以平衡精细的局部控制与全面的场景理解，导致有限的可扩展性和受损的协作质量。在本文中，我们提出了 GauDP，一种新型的 Gaussian图像协同表征，它促进了多智能体协作系统中可扩展的、感知感知的模仿学习。具体而言，GauDP 从去中心化的 RGB 观测中构建一个全局一致的 3D Gaussian 场，然后将 3D Gaussian 属性动态地重新分配到每个智能体的局部视角。这使得所有智能体能够自适应地从共享场景表征中查询任务关键特征，同时保持其个体视角。这种设计促进了精细的控制和全局一致的行为，而无需额外的传感模态（例如，3D 点云）。我们在 RoboFactory 基准上评估了 GauDP，该基准包含不同的多臂操作任务。我们的方法优于现有的基于图像的方法，并接近点云驱动方法的有效性，同时随着智能体数量的增加保持了强大的可扩展性。

title: Breaking the Latency Barrier: Synergistic Perception and Control for High-Frequency 3D Ultrasound Servoing
summary: Real-time tracking of dynamic targets amidst large-scale, high-frequency disturbances remains a critical unsolved challenge in Robotic Ultrasound Systems (RUSS), primarily due to the end-to-end latency of existing systems. This paper argues that breaking this latency barrier requires a fundamental shift towards the synergistic co-design of perception and control. We realize it in a novel framework with two tightly-coupled contributions: (1) a Decoupled Dual-Stream Perception Network that robustly estimates 3D translational state from 2D images at high frequency, and (2) a Single-Step Flow Policy that generates entire action sequences in one inference pass, bypassing the iterative bottleneck of conventional policies. This synergy enables a closed-loop control frequency exceeding 60Hz. On a dynamic phantom, our system not only tracks complex 3D trajectories with a mean error below 6.5mm but also demonstrates robust re-acquisition from over 170mm displacement. Furthermore, it can track targets at speeds of 102mm/s, achieving a terminal error below 1.7mm. Moreover, in-vivo experiments on a human volunteer validate the framework's effectiveness and robustness in a realistic clinical setting. Our work presents a RUSS holistically architected to unify high-bandwidth tracking with large-scale repositioning, a critical step towards robust autonomy in dynamic clinical environments.
tldr: This paper presents a novel robotic ultrasound system (RUSS) framework that achieves high-frequency 3D tracking of dynamic targets by synergistically co-designing perception and control, demonstrating its effectiveness in both phantom and in-vivo experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新型机器人超声系统（RUSS）框架，通过协同设计感知和控制，实现了动态目标的高频3D跟踪，并在体模和体内实验中验证了其有效性。
summary_zh: 在大规模、高频干扰下对动态目标进行实时跟踪仍然是机器人超声系统(RUSS)中一个尚未解决的关键挑战，这主要是由于现有系统的端到端延迟。本文认为，打破这一延迟屏障需要从根本上转向感知和控制的协同联合设计。我们通过一个具有两个紧密耦合贡献的新颖框架来实现这一目标：(1) 一种解耦双流感知网络，能够稳健地从2D图像中高频估计3D平移状态； (2) 一种单步流策略，可以在一次推理中生成完整的动作序列，绕过传统策略的迭代瓶颈。这种协同作用使闭环控制频率超过60Hz。在一个动态体模上，我们的系统不仅能以低于6.5毫米的平均误差跟踪复杂的3D轨迹，还能展示出从超过170毫米位移下的稳健重定位能力。此外，它能够以102毫米/秒的速度跟踪目标，并实现低于1.7毫米的终端误差。更重要的是，在人体志愿者的活体实验验证了该框架在真实的临床环境中的有效性和鲁棒性。我们的工作展示了一种整体架构的RUSS，旨在统一高带宽跟踪与大规模重新定位，这是在动态临床环境中实现稳健自主性的关键一步。

title: When Semantics Connect the Swarm: LLM-Driven Fuzzy Control for Cooperative Multi-Robot Underwater Coverage
summary: Underwater multi-robot cooperative coverage remains challenging due to partial observability, limited communication, environmental uncertainty, and the lack of access to global localization. To address these issues, this paper presents a semantics-guided fuzzy control framework that couples Large Language Models (LLMs) with interpretable control and lightweight coordination. Raw multimodal observations are compressed by the LLM into compact, human-interpretable semantic tokens that summarize obstacles, unexplored regions, and Objects Of Interest (OOIs) under uncertain perception. A fuzzy inference system with pre-defined membership functions then maps these tokens into smooth and stable steering and gait commands, enabling reliable navigation without relying on global positioning. Then, we further coordinate multiple robots by introducing semantic communication that shares intent and local context in linguistic form, enabling agreement on who explores where while avoiding redundant revisits. Extensive simulations in unknown reef-like environments show that, under limited sensing and communication, the proposed framework achieves robust OOI-oriented navigation and cooperative coverage with improved efficiency and adaptability, narrowing the gap between semantic cognition and distributed underwater control in GPS-denied, map-free conditions.
tldr: This paper presents an LLM-driven fuzzy control framework for cooperative multi-robot underwater coverage in GPS-denied environments, using semantic tokens for interpretable control and coordination.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于LLM的模糊控制框架，用于在无GPS环境中进行多机器人水下协同覆盖，使用语义tokens进行可解释的控制和协作。
summary_zh: 水下多机器人协同覆盖任务仍然面临挑战，包括部分可观测性、有限的通信、环境不确定性以及无法获取全局定位。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种语义引导的模糊控制框架，该框架将大型语言模型（LLMs）与可解释的控制和轻量级协调相结合。原始的多模态观测数据被LLM压缩成紧凑且易于理解的语义令牌，这些令牌在不确定的感知条件下总结了障碍物、未探索区域和感兴趣对象（OOIs）。然后，具有预定义隶属函数的模糊推理系统将这些令牌映射为平滑且稳定的转向和步态指令，无需依赖全局定位即可实现可靠的导航。进一步地，我们通过引入语义通信来协调多个机器人，该通信以语言形式共享意图和局部环境上下文，从而能够在避免重复访问的同时，就探索区域达成一致。在未知的礁石状环境中进行的广泛仿真表明，在有限的感知和通信条件下，所提出的框架实现了鲁棒的、以OOI为导向的导航和协同覆盖，并具有更高的效率和适应性，缩小了在无GPS、无地图条件下语义认知与分布式水下控制之间的差距。

title: Tool Zero: Training Tool-Augmented LLMs via Pure RL from Scratch
summary: Training tool-augmented LLMs has emerged as a promising approach to enhancing language models' capabilities for complex tasks. The current supervised fine-tuning paradigm relies on constructing extensive domain-specific datasets to train models. However, this approach often struggles to generalize effectively to unfamiliar or intricate tool-use scenarios. Recently, reinforcement learning (RL) paradigm can endow LLMs with superior reasoning and generalization abilities. In this work, we address a key question: Can the pure RL be used to effectively elicit a model's intrinsic reasoning capabilities and enhance the tool-agnostic generalization? We propose a dynamic generalization-guided reward design for rule-based RL, which progressively shifts rewards from exploratory to exploitative tool-use patterns. Based on this design, we introduce the Tool-Zero series models. These models are trained to enable LLMs to autonomously utilize general tools by directly scaling up RL from Zero models (i.e., base models without post-training). Experimental results demonstrate that our models achieve over 7% performance improvement compared to both SFT and RL-with-SFT models under the same experimental settings. These gains are consistently replicated across cross-dataset and intra-dataset evaluations, validating the effectiveness and robustness of our methods.
tldr: This paper introduces Tool-Zero, a method for training tool-augmented LLMs using pure reinforcement learning from scratch with a dynamic generalization-guided reward design, achieving performance improvements over SFT and RL-with-SFT baselines.
tldr_zh: 这篇论文介绍了Tool-Zero，一种使用纯强化学习从零开始训练工具增强的LLM的方法，该方法采用动态泛化引导的奖励设计，并在性能上优于SFT和基于SFT的RL基线。
summary_zh: 训练工具增强型LLM已经成为一种提升语言模型在复杂任务中能力的有前景的方法。目前，监督式微调范式依赖于构建大规模的特定领域数据集来训练模型。然而，这种方法通常难以有效地泛化到不熟悉或复杂的工具使用场景。最近，强化学习（RL）范式可以赋予LLM更强的推理和泛化能力。在这项工作中，我们解决一个关键问题：纯粹的RL能否被用于有效地激发模型的内在推理能力，并增强工具无关的泛化能力？我们提出了一种基于规则的RL的动态泛化引导奖励设计，其逐步将奖励从探索性工具使用模式转移到利用性工具使用模式。基于这种设计，我们引入了Tool-Zero系列模型。这些模型经过训练，使LLM能够通过直接放大来自Zero模型的RL（即，没有后训练的基础模型）来自主使用通用工具。实验结果表明，在相同的实验设置下，我们的模型比SFT和带有SFT的RL模型均取得了超过7%的性能提升。这些增益在跨数据集和数据集内评估中均得到一致复制，验证了我们方法的有效性和鲁棒性。

title: GUI-AIMA: Aligning Intrinsic Multimodal Attention with a Context Anchor for GUI Grounding
summary: Graphical user interface (GUI) grounding is a key function of computer-use agents, which maps natural-language instructions to actionable screen regions. Existing approaches based on Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) typically formulate it as a text-based coordinate generation task, yet directly generating precise coordinates from visual inputs remains challenging and computationally intensive. An intuitive way to implement GUI grounding is to first select visual patches relevant to the instructions and then determine the precise click location within those patches. Based on the observations that general MLLMs have some native grounding capability, nested within their attentions, we propose GUI-AIMA, an attention-based and coordinate-free supervised fine-tuning framework for efficient GUI grounding. GUI-AIMA aligns the intrinsic multimodal attention of MLLMs with patch-wise grounding signals. These signals are calculated adaptively for diverse user instructions by multi-head aggregation on simplified query-visual attention matrices. Besides, its coordinate-free manner can easily integrate a plug-and-play zoom-in stage. GUI-AIMA-3B was trained with only 85k screenshots, demonstrating exceptional data efficiency and verifying that light training can trigger the native grounding capability of MLLMs. It achieves state-of-the-art performance among 3B models, attaining an average accuracy of 59.6% on ScreenSpot-Pro, 63.8% on OSWorld-G and 91.5% on ScreenSpot-v2. Project page: https://github.com/sjz5202/GUI-AIMA
tldr: The paper introduces GUI-AIMA, a coordinate-free, attention-based fine-tuning framework that leverages the intrinsic multimodal attention of MLLMs for efficient GUI grounding, achieving SOTA performance among 3B models with high data efficiency.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了GUI-AIMA，一个无坐标的、基于注意力的微调框架，它利用 MLLM 固有的多模态注意力来实现高效的 GUI 接地，并在数据效率高的情况下，在 3B 模型中实现了 SOTA 性能。
summary_zh: 图形用户界面(GUI)定位是计算机使用代理的关键功能，它将自然语言指令映射到可操作的屏幕区域。现有的基于多模态大型语言模型(MLLM)的方法通常将其表述为基于文本的坐标生成任务，然而，直接从视觉输入生成精确坐标仍然具有挑战性且计算密集。一个实现GUI定位的直观方法是首先选择与指令相关的视觉块，然后确定这些块内的精确点击位置。基于通用MLLM在其注意力机制中具有一些原生定位能力的观察，我们提出了GUI-AIMA，一个基于注意力机制和无坐标的监督微调框架，用于高效的GUI定位。GUI-AIMA将MLLM固有的多模态注意力与块级定位信号对齐。这些信号通过在简化的查询-视觉注意力矩阵上进行多头聚合来为不同的用户指令自适应地计算。此外，其无坐标的方式可以轻松集成一个即插即用的放大阶段。 GUI-AIMA-3B仅使用8.5万张截图进行训练，表现出卓越的数据效率，并验证了轻量级训练可以触发MLLM的原生定位能力。它在3B模型中取得了最先进的性能，在ScreenSpot-Pro上达到平均准确率59.6%，在OSWorld-G上达到63.8%，在ScreenSpot-v2上达到91.5%。项目主页：https://github.com/sjz5202/GUI-AIMA

title: Logic-informed reinforcement learning for cross-domain optimization of large-scale cyber-physical systems
summary: Cyber-physical systems (CPS) require the joint optimization of discrete cyber actions and continuous physical parameters under stringent safety logic constraints. However, existing hierarchical approaches often compromise global optimality, whereas reinforcement learning (RL) in hybrid action spaces often relies on brittle reward penalties, masking, or shielding and struggles to guarantee constraint satisfaction. We present logic-informed reinforcement learning (LIRL), which equips standard policy-gradient algorithms with projection that maps a low-dimensional latent action onto the admissible hybrid manifold defined on-the-fly by first-order logic. This guarantees feasibility of every exploratory step without penalty tuning. Experimental evaluations have been conducted across multiple scenarios, including industrial manufacturing, electric vehicle charging stations, and traffic signal control, in all of which the proposed method outperforms existing hierarchical optimization approaches. Taking a robotic reducer assembly system in industrial manufacturing as an example, LIRL achieves a 36.47\% to 44.33\% reduction at most in the combined makespan-energy objective compared to conventional industrial hierarchical scheduling methods. Meanwhile, it consistently maintains zero constraint violations and significantly surpasses state-of-the-art hybrid-action reinforcement learning baselines. Thanks to its declarative logic-based constraint formulation, the framework can be seamlessly transferred to other domains such as smart transportation and smart grid, thereby paving the way for safe and real-time optimization in large-scale CPS.
tldr: The paper introduces Logic-Informed Reinforcement Learning (LIRL) for optimizing cyber-physical systems by integrating first-order logic constraints into policy-gradient algorithms, ensuring feasibility and outperforming hierarchical approaches across multiple domains.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了逻辑指导的强化学习（LIRL），通过将一阶逻辑约束集成到策略梯度算法中来优化信息物理系统，从而确保可行性并在多个领域中胜过分层方法。
summary_zh: 网络物理系统(CPS)需要在严格的安全逻辑约束下，联合优化离散的网络动作和连续的物理参数。然而，现有的分层方法通常会牺牲全局最优性，而混合动作空间中的强化学习(RL)通常依赖于脆弱的奖励惩罚、掩蔽或屏蔽，并且难以保证约束的满足。我们提出了逻辑引导的强化学习(LIRL)，该方法为标准策略梯度算法配备了投影机制，将低维潜在动作映射到由一阶逻辑动态定义的容许混合流形上。这保证了每一步探索的可行性，而无需进行惩罚调整。我们在包括工业制造、电动汽车充电站和交通信号控制在内的多个场景中进行了实验评估，结果表明，所提出的方法优于现有的分层优化方法。以工业制造中的机器人减速器装配系统为例，与传统的工业分层调度方法相比，LIRL在综合完工时间-能源目标方面最多实现了 36.47% 到 44.33% 的降低。与此同时，它始终保持零约束违规，并显著超越了最先进的混合动作强化学习基线。得益于其基于声明性逻辑的约束公式，该框架可以无缝转移到智能交通和智能电网等其他领域，从而为大规模CPS中的安全和实时优化铺平道路。

title: Video Models Start to Solve Chess, Maze, Sudoku, Mental Rotation, and Raven' Matrices
summary: We show that video generation models could reason now. Testing on tasks such as chess, maze, Sudoku, mental rotation, and Raven's Matrices, leading models such as Sora-2 achieve sixty percent success rates. We establish a robust experimental paradigm centered on the "Task Pair" design. We build a code framework, with 39 models available already, that supports this paradigm and allows for easy scaling - users can add models and tasks efficiently. We show our automated evaluation strongly correlates with human judgment, and therefore this paradigm is highly scalable. We see an opportunity, given the availability of our paradigm, to do reinforcement learning for improving reasoning in video models. You could checkout all of our raw $\href{https://grow-ai-like-a-child.com/video-reason/}{results}$ and our $\href{https://github.com/hokindeng/VMEvalKit}{VMEvalKit}$ codebase.
tldr: The paper introduces a framework for evaluating video generation models on reasoning tasks like chess and Sudoku, demonstrating that models like Sora-2 achieve reasonable success and providing a scalable paradigm for future research, including reinforcement learning.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个评估视频生成模型在国际象棋和数独等推理任务上的框架，表明像Sora-2这样的模型取得了一定的成功，并为未来的研究提供了一个可扩展的范例，包括强化学习。
summary_zh: 我们证明了视频生成模型现在能够进行推理。在诸如国际象棋、迷宫、数独、心理旋转和瑞文矩阵等任务上进行测试，Sora-2等领先模型达到了百分之六十的成功率。我们建立了一个围绕“任务对”设计的稳健实验范式。我们构建了一个代码框架，目前已有39个模型可用，该框架支持此范式并允许轻松扩展 - 用户可以高效地添加模型和任务。我们证明了我们的自动化评估与人类判断高度相关，因此这种范式具有高度的可扩展性。鉴于我们范式的可用性，我们看到了一个利用强化学习来改进视频模型推理能力的机会。您可以查看我们所有的 $\href{https://grow-ai-like-a-child.com/video-reason/}{结果}$ 以及我们的 $\href{https://github.com/hokindeng/VMEvalKit}{VMEvalKit}$ 代码库。

title: Active Thinking Model: A Goal-Directed Self-Improving Framework for Real-World Adaptive Intelligence
summary: Real-world artificial intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly required to operate autonomously in dynamic, uncertain, and continuously changing environments. However, most existing AI models rely on predefined objectives, static training data, and externally supplied feedback, which restrict their ability to adapt, reflect, and improve independently. In this paper, we propose the Active Thinking Model (ATM)- a unified cognitive framework that integrates goal reasoning, dynamic task generation, and self-reflective learning into an adaptive architecture. Unlike conventional systems that passively execute fixed procedures, ATM actively evaluates its performance through logical reasoning and environmental indicators, reuses effective methods to solve new problems, and generates novel strategies for unseen situations via a continuous self-improvement loop. A mathematically grounded theoretical analysis demonstrates that ATM can autonomously evolve from suboptimal to optimal behavior without external supervision and maintain bounded tracking regret under changing environmental conditions.
tldr: The paper introduces the Active Thinking Model (ATM), a novel cognitive framework enabling autonomous AI agents to adapt and improve in dynamic environments through goal reasoning, dynamic task generation, and self-reflection.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为主动思考模型 (ATM) 的新型认知框架，该框架使自主 AI 代理能够通过目标推理、动态任务生成和自我反思来适应动态环境并在动态环境中改进。
summary_zh: 现实世界的人工智能(AI)系统越来越需要在动态、不确定和持续变化的环境中自主运行。然而，大多数现有AI模型依赖于预定义的目标、静态训练数据和外部提供的反馈，这限制了它们独立适应、反思和改进的能力。在本文中，我们提出了主动思考模型(ATM)- 一种统一的认知框架，将目标推理、动态任务生成和自反思学习整合到一个自适应架构中。与被动执行固定程序的传统系统不同，ATM通过逻辑推理和环境指标主动评估其性能，重用有效方法来解决新问题，并通过持续的自我改进循环为未见情况生成新策略。一项基于数学的理论分析表明，ATM可以在没有外部监督的情况下自主地从次优行为演化为最优行为，并在变化的环境条件下保持有界的跟踪遗憾。

title: Ariadne: A Controllable Framework for Probing and Extending VLM Reasoning Boundaries
summary: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) post-trained with Reinforcement Learning (RL) show impressive general reasoning, their evaluation is often confined to language-dominant tasks (e.g., math). This raises a critical question: can RL post-training truly extend the inherent capability boundary of a base VLM, particularly for visual-centric spatial tasks where it initially fails? To investigate this, we introduce Ariadne, a framework utilizing synthetic mazes for multi-step spatial reasoning where task difficulty (e.g., path length, turns) is precisely controlled. We leverage this controllable environment to train VLMs using Reinforcement Learning with Verified Rewards (RLVR) in a difficulty-aware curriculum. Surprisingly, post-RLVR training, the VLM achieves over 50% accuracy on a problem set where the base model scored 0%, demonstrating that our approach expands the model's initial capability boundary. To assess real-world viability, we evaluate out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization on practical benchmarks. Despite training only on synthetic maze samples, Ariadne achieves significant zero-shot improvements, averaging 16% on MapBench (e.g., museum navigation) and 24% on ReasonMap (subway transfer tasks). These results confirm that our method not only broadens the model's fundamental limits but also enhances its generalization to real-world spatial reasoning. We acknowledge our study is limited to the post-training phase, given the opaqueness of pre-training data, and hope our research motivates further work on specialized, capability-extending alignment.
tldr: The paper introduces Ariadne, a framework for using RL with synthetic mazes to extend the spatial reasoning capabilities of VLMs, demonstrating improvements on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Ariadne框架，该框架利用强化学习和合成迷宫来扩展视觉语言模型（VLM）的空间推理能力，并在合成和现实世界的基准测试中展示了改进。
summary_zh: 尽管使用强化学习(RL)进行后训练的视觉-语言模型(VLM)展现出了令人印象深刻的通用推理能力，但其评估常常局限于语言主导型任务（例如，数学题）。这引出了一个关键问题：强化学习后训练是否能真正扩展基础VLM固有的能力边界，尤其是在最初失败的以视觉为中心的空间任务中？为了对此进行研究，我们引入了Ariadne，一个利用合成迷宫进行多步空间推理的框架，在该框架中，任务难度（例如，路径长度、转弯次数）可以被精确控制。我们利用这个可控环境，通过难度感知课程，使用带有验证奖励的强化学习(RLVR)来训练VLM。令人惊讶的是，在RLVR后训练后，VLM在一个基础模型得分为0%的问题集上实现了超过50%的准确率，这表明我们的方法扩展了模型最初的能力边界。为了评估现实世界的可行性，我们评估了在实际基准测试上的分布外(OOD)泛化能力。尽管仅在合成迷宫样本上进行训练，Ariadne仍实现了显著的零样本改进，在MapBench（例如，博物馆导航）上平均提高了16%，在ReasonMap（地铁换乘任务）上平均提高了24%。这些结果证实，我们的方法不仅拓宽了模型的基本限制，还增强了其对现实世界空间推理的泛化能力。我们承认，由于预训练数据的不透明性，我们的研究仅限于后训练阶段，并希望我们的研究能够激发更多关于专门的、扩展能力的对齐工作。

title: GrowthHacker: Automated Off-Policy Evaluation Optimization Using Code-Modifying LLM Agents
summary: With the software industry shifting toward a data-driven culture, online A/B testing is a key tool for evaluating new technologies. However, deploying such experiments requires substantial resources, may negatively impact users, and involves long data collection periods. To address this, \textit{off-policy evaluation (OPE)}, or offline A/B testing, uses logged data to assess technologies and is fundamental in Reinforcement Learning, making it crucial in domains where online testing is costly or risky, such as healthcare, recommender systems, education, dialog systems, and robotics. Despite advances in coding LLMs and agentic AI, little is known about leveraging them to optimize OPE results. We investigate whether LLMs and LLM-based agents can improve OPE performance via code optimization. We propose \textit{GrowthHacker}, a benchmark with agent and baseline methods on large-scale real-world datasets, which iteratively optimizes code, evaluates results, and begins new optimization cycles. We collected datasets, established protocols, implemented baselines for OPE on the Open Bandit Pipeline (OBP)~\cite{saito2021openbanditdatasetpipeline} and Scope-RL~\cite{kiyohara2023scope}, and developed the \textit{two_agent} framework, which reduces system complexity while preserving optimization effectiveness. Results show the two_agent framework achieves 100% reliability and the highest average improvement of 106.7% among positive outcomes. Both two_agent and CrewAI reach 45% success rates, outperforming AutoGen's 34%. These findings demonstrate the feasibility of LLM-based agents as automated "growth hackers" to enhance OPE systems, with implications for scaling data-driven decision-making in production.
tldr: The paper explores using code-modifying LLM agents to optimize off-policy evaluation (OPE), presenting a benchmark called GrowthHacker, along with the two_agent framework, demonstrating significant performance improvements.
tldr_zh: 该论文探讨了使用代码修改型LLM智能体来优化离策略评估（OPE），提出了一个名为GrowthHacker的基准，以及two_agent框架，展示了显著的性能提升。
summary_zh: 随着软件行业向数据驱动文化转变，在线A/B测试成为评估新技术的关键工具。然而，部署此类实验需要大量资源，可能对用户产生负面影响，并且涉及较长的数据收集周期。为了解决这个问题，离线策略评估（OPE）或离线A/B测试使用日志数据来评估技术，它是强化学习的基础，在医疗保健、推荐系统、教育、对话系统和机器人等在线测试成本高昂或风险较大的领域至关重要。尽管在编码LLM和Agentic AI方面取得了进展，但关于利用它们来优化OPE结果的研究仍然很少。我们研究了LLM和基于LLM的智能体是否可以通过代码优化来提高OPE性能。我们提出了GrowthHacker，一个包含智能体和基线方法的大规模真实世界数据集上的基准测试，它可以迭代地优化代码，评估结果，并开始新的优化周期。我们收集了数据集，建立了协议，在Open Bandit Pipeline (OBP)~\cite{saito2021openbanditdatasetpipeline}和Scope-RL~\cite{kiyohara2023scope}上实施了OPE的基线方法，并开发了two_agent框架，该框架在保持优化有效性的同时降低了系统复杂性。结果表明，two_agent框架实现了100%的可靠性，并在积极结果中实现了最高的平均改善率，为106.7%。two_agent和CrewAI均达到45%的成功率，优于AutoGen的34%。这些发现证明了基于LLM的智能体作为自动化“增长黑客”来增强OPE系统的可行性，对扩展生产中的数据驱动决策具有重要意义。

title: AReaL-Hex: Accommodating Asynchronous RL Training over Heterogeneous GPUs
summary: Maximizing training throughput and cost-efficiency of RL for LLMs is essential to democratize this advanced technique. One promising but challenging approach is to deploy such a computational workflow over heterogeneous GPUs. Unlike conventional large-scale LLM pretraining, RL training generally decomposes into three coupled stages, i.e., rollout generation, reward computation, and policy/value updates, which exhibit markedly different compute intensities, memory footprints, and communication patterns. Recent research shows that fully asynchronous RL training can disaggregate these stages across disjoint hardware pools without sacrificing training stability, creating a great opportunity for real-world heterogeneous deployment. To this end, we present AReaL-Hex, a heterogeneity-aware asynchronous RL training system that effectively schedules how to execute rollout generation and policy model training over heterogeneous GPUs while enforcing data staleness bounds. Concretely, we use a two-phase scheduler: (i) a constrained search with MILP to select per-stage parallelization strategies and workload assignments given a resource budget, and (ii) a graph-partitioning step that allocates heterogeneous GPUs and interconnects to maximize end-to-end throughput. Built atop a fully asynchronous RL architecture, AReaL-Hex maps HBM-I/O-bound generation and compute-bound optimization to more cost-efficient resources and balances their producer-consumer interactions to avoid both idleness and stale rollout trajectories. On the mathematical reasoning task with various model scales (1.5B, 7B, and 14B), compared to homogeneous deployments of state-of-the-art asynchronous RL systems: (i) When maintaining the same total budgets, AReaL-Hex delivers up to 1.50x higher training throughput; (ii) When achieving the same training throughput, AReaL-Hex results in up to 1.46x reduction in training cost.
tldr: The paper introduces AReaL-Hex, a system for asynchronous RL training of LLMs on heterogeneous GPUs that optimizes for both throughput and cost-efficiency by intelligently scheduling rollout generation and policy updates. Experiments show improved throughput and reduced cost compared to homogeneous deployments.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了AReaL-Hex，一个用于在异构GPU上异步强化学习训练LLM的系统，通过智能调度rollout生成和策略更新来优化吞吐量和成本效益。实验表明，与同构部署相比，吞吐量有所提高，成本有所降低。
summary_zh: 最大化用于LLM的强化学习（RL）的训练吞吐量和成本效益对于普及这项先进技术至关重要。一种有前景但具有挑战性的方法是在异构GPU上部署此类计算工作流。与传统的大规模LLM预训练不同，RL训练通常分解为三个耦合的阶段，即 rollout生成、奖励计算和策略/价值更新，这些阶段表现出明显不同的计算密集度、内存占用和通信模式。最近的研究表明，完全异步的RL训练可以将这些阶段分散到不相交的硬件池中，而不会牺牲训练稳定性，这为现实世界的异构部署创造了巨大的机会。为此，我们提出了 AReaL-Hex，一种感知异构性的异步 RL 训练系统，它有效地调度如何在异构 GPU 上执行 rollout 生成和策略模型训练，同时强制执行数据陈旧性界限。具体来说，我们使用一个两阶段调度器：（i）在资源预算下，利用 MILP 进行约束搜索，以选择每个阶段的并行化策略和工作负载分配；以及（ii）一个图划分步骤，分配异构 GPU 和互连，以最大化端到端吞吐量。AReaL-Hex 构建在完全异步的 RL 架构之上，将 HBM-I/O 密集型的生成和计算密集型的优化映射到更具成本效益的资源，并平衡它们的生产者-消费者交互，以避免空闲和陈旧的 rollout 轨迹。在使用各种模型规模（1.5B、7B 和 14B）的数学推理任务上，与最先进的异步 RL 系统的同构部署相比：（i）在保持相同总预算的情况下，AReaL-Hex 提供了高达 1.50 倍的训练吞吐量；（ii）在达到相同训练吞吐量的情况下，AReaL-Hex 实现了高达 1.46 倍的训练成本降低。

title: XFlowMP: Task-Conditioned Motion Fields for Generative Robot Planning with Schrodinger Bridges
summary: Generative robotic motion planning requires not only the synthesis of smooth and collision-free trajectories but also feasibility across diverse tasks and dynamic constraints. Prior planning methods, both traditional and generative, often struggle to incorporate high-level semantics with low-level constraints, especially the nexus between task configurations and motion controllability. In this work, we present XFlowMP, a task-conditioned generative motion planner that models robot trajectory evolution as entropic flows bridging stochastic noises and expert demonstrations via Schrodinger bridges given the inquiry task configuration. Specifically, our method leverages Schrodinger bridges as a conditional flow matching coupled with a score function to learn motion fields with high-order dynamics while encoding start-goal configurations, enabling the generation of collision-free and dynamically-feasible motions. Through evaluations, XFlowMP achieves up to 53.79% lower maximum mean discrepancy, 36.36% smoother motions, and 39.88% lower energy consumption while comparing to the next-best baseline on the RobotPointMass benchmark, and also reducing short-horizon planning time by 11.72%. On long-horizon motions in the LASA Handwriting dataset, our method maintains the trajectories with 1.26% lower maximum mean discrepancy, 3.96% smoother, and 31.97% lower energy. We further demonstrate the practicality of our method on the Kinova Gen3 manipulator, executing planning motions and confirming its robustness in real-world settings.
tldr: XFlowMP is a task-conditioned generative robot motion planner using Schrodinger bridges for dynamically feasible trajectory generation, outperforming baselines in MMD, smoothness, and energy consumption, demonstrated on both simulated and real robots.
tldr_zh: XFlowMP是一种任务条件下的生成式机器人运动规划器，它使用薛定谔桥生成动态可行的轨迹，在最大平均差异（MMD）、平滑度和能耗方面优于基线，并在模拟和真实的机器人上进行了演示。
summary_zh: 生成式机器人运动规划不仅需要合成平滑且无碰撞的轨迹，还需要满足各种任务和动态约束下的可行性。先前的规划方法，无论是传统的还是生成式的，通常难以将高层语义与低层约束相结合，特别是在任务配置与运动可控性之间的联系上。本文提出了XFlowMP，一种任务条件生成式运动规划器，它通过薛定谔桥模拟机器人轨迹演化，将随机噪声和专家演示连接起来，从而基于给定的查询任务配置建模熵流。具体来说，我们的方法利用薛定谔桥作为一种条件流匹配，并结合得分函数来学习具有高阶动力学的运动场，同时编码起始-目标配置，从而能够生成无碰撞且动态可行的运动。通过评估，与RobotPointMass基准测试中表现次优的基线方法相比，XFlowMP的最大均值差异降低了高达53.79%，运动平滑度提高了36.36%，能量消耗降低了39.88%，同时将短时程规划时间减少了11.72%。在LASA Handwriting数据集上的长时程运动中，我们的方法保持了轨迹，最大均值差异降低了1.26%，平滑度提高了3.96%，能量降低了31.97%。我们进一步在Kinova Gen3机械臂上展示了我们方法的实用性，执行了规划运动，并证实了其在真实世界环境中的鲁棒性。

title: Heuristic Step Planning for Learning Dynamic Bipedal Locomotion: A Comparative Study of Model-Based and Model-Free Approaches
summary: This work presents an extended framework for learning-based bipedal locomotion that incorporates a heuristic step-planning strategy guided by desired torso velocity tracking. The framework enables precise interaction between a humanoid robot and its environment, supporting tasks such as crossing gaps and accurately approaching target objects. Unlike approaches based on full or simplified dynamics, the proposed method avoids complex step planners and analytical models. Step planning is primarily driven by heuristic commands, while a Raibert-type controller modulates the foot placement length based on the error between desired and actual torso velocity. We compare our method with a model-based step-planning approach -- the Linear Inverted Pendulum Model (LIPM) controller. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach attains comparable or superior accuracy in maintaining target velocity (up to 80%), significantly greater robustness on uneven terrain (over 50% improvement), and improved energy efficiency. These results suggest that incorporating complex analytical, model-based components into the training architecture may be unnecessary for achieving stable and robust bipedal walking, even in unstructured environments.
tldr: This paper introduces a heuristic, model-free approach for bipedal locomotion that achieves comparable or superior results to model-based methods like LIPM in terms of velocity tracking, robustness on uneven terrain, and energy efficiency.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种启发式的、无模型的双足运动方法，该方法在速度跟踪、不平坦地形上的鲁棒性和能源效率方面，实现了与基于模型的方法（如LIPM）相当甚至更优越的结果。
summary_zh: 本研究提出了一种扩展的基于学习的双足步行框架，该框架结合了一种基于期望躯干速度跟踪的启发式步态规划策略。该框架实现了人形机器人与其环境之间的精确交互，支持跨越间隙和精确接近目标物体等任务。与基于完整或简化动力学的方法不同，所提出的方法避免了复杂的步态规划器和解析模型。步态规划主要由启发式指令驱动，而 Raibert 型控制器则根据期望躯干速度与实际躯干速度之间的误差来调节足部着陆长度。我们将我们的方法与基于模型的步态规划方法——线性倒立摆模型 (LIPM) 控制器进行了比较。实验结果表明，我们的方法在保持目标速度方面达到了相当或更高的精度（高达 80%），在不平坦地形上具有显著更高的鲁棒性（超过 50% 的改进），并且提高了能源效率。这些结果表明，即便在非结构化环境中，为了实现稳定且鲁棒的双足行走，在训练架构中纳入复杂的解析、基于模型的组件可能是不必要的。

title: Real-Time Learning of Predictive Dynamic Obstacle Models for Robotic Motion Planning
summary: Autonomous systems often must predict the motions of nearby agents from partial and noisy data. This paper asks and answers the question: "can we learn, in real-time, a nonlinear predictive model of another agent's motions?" Our online framework denoises and forecasts such dynamics using a modified sliding-window Hankel Dynamic Mode Decomposition (Hankel-DMD). Partial noisy measurements are embedded into a Hankel matrix, while an associated Page matrix enables singular-value hard thresholding (SVHT) to estimate the effective rank. A Cadzow projection enforces structured low-rank consistency, yielding a denoised trajectory and local noise variance estimates. From this representation, a time-varying Hankel-DMD lifted linear predictor is constructed for multi-step forecasts. The residual analysis provides variance-tracking signals that can support downstream estimators and risk-aware planning. We validate the approach in simulation under Gaussian and heavy-tailed noise, and experimentally on a dynamic crane testbed. Results show that the method achieves stable variance-aware denoising and short-horizon prediction suitable for integration into real-time control frameworks.
tldr: This paper presents a real-time capable method for learning predictive models of dynamic agents using a modified Hankel Dynamic Mode Decomposition, suitable for integration into robotic control frameworks.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种实时的学习动态智能体预测模型的方法，该方法使用改进的Hankel动态模态分解，适用于集成到机器人控制框架中。
summary_zh: 自主系统通常需要从局部且含噪声的数据中预测附近智能体的运动。本文提出并解答了这样一个问题：“我们能否实时学习另一个智能体运动的非线性预测模型？”我们的在线框架利用改进的滑动窗口 Hankel 动态模态分解（Hankel-DMD）来去噪和预测此类动力学。局部的含噪声测量被嵌入到一个 Hankel 矩阵中，同时关联的 Page 矩阵能够进行奇异值硬阈值化（SVHT）以估计有效秩。Cadzow 投影强制执行结构化低秩一致性，从而产生去噪轨迹和局部噪声方差估计。从该表示中，构建一个时变 Hankel-DMD 提升的线性预测器用于多步预测。残差分析提供方差跟踪信号，可以支持下游估计器和风险感知规划。我们在高斯噪声和重尾噪声下的仿真以及动态起重机测试平台上进行了实验验证。结果表明，该方法实现了稳定的方差感知去噪和短时预测，适用于集成到实时控制框架中。

title: Model-free source seeking of exponentially convergent unicycle: theoretical and robotic experimental results
summary: This paper introduces a novel model-free, real-time unicycle-based source seeking design. This design autonomously steers the unicycle dynamic system towards the extremum point of an objective function or physical/scalar signal that is unknown expression-wise, but accessible via measurements. A key contribution of this paper is that the introduced design converges exponentially to the extremum point of objective functions (or scalar signals) that behave locally like a higher-degree power function (e.g., fourth-degree polynomial function) as opposed to locally quadratic objective functions, the usual case in literature. We provide theoretical results and design characterization, supported by a variety of simulation results that demonstrate the robustness of the proposed design, including cases with different initial conditions and measurement delays/noise. Also, for the first time in the literature, we provide experimental robotic results that demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed design and its exponential convergence ability. These experimental results confirm that the proposed exponentially convergent extremum seeking design can be practically realized on a physical robotic platform under real-world sensing and actuation constraints.
tldr: This paper presents a novel model-free source seeking algorithm for unicycles that achieves exponential convergence to the extremum of higher-degree functions, validated through both simulations and robotic experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的针对单轮车的无模型寻源算法，该算法可以实现对高阶函数极值的指数收敛，并通过仿真和机器人实验进行了验证。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种新颖的、基于单轮车的无模型实时信源搜索设计。该设计能够自主引导单轮车动力系统朝着一个目标函数或物理/标量信号的极值点移动，该目标函数或信号的具体表达式未知，但可以通过测量获得。本文的一个主要贡献是提出的设计能够以指数形式收敛到目标函数（或标量信号）的极值点，这些目标函数在局部表现得类似于更高次幂函数（例如，四次多项式函数），而不是文献中常见的局部二次目标函数。我们提供了理论结果和设计特性，并通过各种仿真结果验证了所提出设计的鲁棒性，包括不同初始条件以及存在测量延迟/噪声的情况。此外，本文首次提供了实验机器人结果，证明了所提出设计的有效性及其指数收敛能力。这些实验结果证实了所提出的指数收敛极值搜索设计可以在实际的机器人平台上，在真实的传感和驱动约束下实现。

title: Aligning LLM agents with human learning and adjustment behavior: a dual agent approach
summary: Effective modeling of how human travelers learn and adjust their travel behavior from interacting with transportation systems is critical for system assessment and planning. However, this task is also difficult due to the complex cognition and decision-making involved in such behavior. Recent research has begun to leverage Large Language Model (LLM) agents for this task. Building on this, we introduce a novel dual-agent framework that enables continuous learning and alignment between LLM agents and human travelers on learning and adaptation behavior from online data streams. Our approach involves a set of LLM traveler agents, equipped with a memory system and a learnable persona, which serve as simulators for human travelers. To ensure behavioral alignment, we introduce an LLM calibration agent that leverages the reasoning and analytical capabilities of LLMs to train the personas of these traveler agents. Working together, this dual-agent system is designed to track and align the underlying decision-making mechanisms of travelers and produce realistic, adaptive simulations. Using a real-world dataset from a day-to-day route choice experiment, we show our approach significantly outperforms existing LLM-based methods in both individual behavioral alignment and aggregate simulation accuracy. Furthermore, we demonstrate that our method moves beyond simple behavioral mimicry to capture the evolution of underlying learning processes, a deeper alignment that fosters robust generalization. Overall, our framework provides a new approach for creating adaptive and behaviorally realistic agents to simulate travelers' learning and adaptation that can benefit transportation simulation and policy analysis.
tldr: This paper introduces a dual-agent framework using LLMs to simulate human traveler behavior, achieving improved alignment with real-world data compared to existing LLM-based methods.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个使用LLM的双智能体框架来模拟人类旅行者行为，与现有的基于LLM的方法相比，该框架与现实世界数据实现了更好的对齐。
summary_zh: 对人类旅行者如何从与交通系统的交互中学习并调整出行行为进行有效建模，对于系统评估和规划至关重要。然而，由于涉及复杂认知和决策过程，这项任务也颇具难度。 近期研究已开始利用大型语言模型（LLM）代理来解决这一问题。 在此基础上，我们提出一种新颖的双代理框架，该框架能够在在线数据流中实现LLM代理与人类旅行者在学习和适应行为上的持续学习和对齐。 我们的方法涉及一组配备了记忆系统和可学习角色的LLM旅行者代理，这些代理充当人类旅行者的模拟器。 为确保行为对齐，我们引入了一个LLM校准代理，该代理利用LLM的推理和分析能力来训练这些旅行者代理的角色。通过协同工作，该双代理系统旨在跟踪和对齐旅行者的潜在决策机制，并产生逼真且自适应的仿真结果。 通过使用来自日常路线选择实验的真实世界数据集，我们表明我们的方法在个体行为对齐和总体仿真精度方面均显著优于现有的基于LLM的方法。 此外，我们还证明我们的方法超越了简单的行为模仿，捕捉到了底层学习过程的演变，这种更深层次的对齐促进了强大的泛化能力。 总体而言，我们的框架提供了一种创建自适应和行为逼真代理的新方法，以模拟旅行者的学习和适应过程，从而有助于交通仿真和政策分析。

title: Clustering-Based Weight Orthogonalization for Stabilizing Deep Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has made significant advancements, achieving superhuman performance in various tasks. However, RL agents often operate under the assumption of environmental stationarity, which poses a great challenge to learning efficiency since many environments are inherently non-stationary. This non-stationarity results in the requirement of millions of iterations, leading to low sample efficiency. To address this issue, we introduce the Clustering Orthogonal Weight Modified (COWM) layer, which can be integrated into the policy network of any RL algorithm and mitigate non-stationarity effectively. The COWM layer stabilizes the learning process by employing clustering techniques and a projection matrix. Our approach not only improves learning speed but also reduces gradient interference, thereby enhancing the overall learning efficiency. Empirically, the COWM outperforms state-of-the-art methods and achieves improvements of 9% and 12.6% in vision based and state-based DMControl benchmark. It also shows robustness and generality across various algorithms and tasks.
tldr: The paper introduces a Clustering Orthogonal Weight Modified (COWM) layer to stabilize deep reinforcement learning in non-stationary environments, improving learning speed and reducing gradient interference, with reported performance gains on DMControl benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种聚类正交权重修正（COWM）层，用于稳定非平稳环境中的深度强化学习，提高了学习速度并减少了梯度干扰，并在 DMControl 基准测试中取得了性能提升。
summary_zh: 强化学习（RL）取得了显著进展，在各种任务中实现了超越人类的表现。然而，强化学习智能体通常在环境平稳性的假设下运行，这给学习效率带来了巨大的挑战，因为许多环境本质上是非平稳的。这种非平稳性导致需要数百万次迭代，从而导致低样本效率。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了聚类正交权重修正（COWM）层，它可以集成到任何强化学习算法的策略网络中，并有效地缓解非平稳性。COWM层通过采用聚类技术和投影矩阵来稳定学习过程。我们的方法不仅提高了学习速度，而且减少了梯度干扰，从而提高了整体学习效率。在实验上，COWM优于最先进的方法，并在基于视觉和基于状态的DMControl基准测试中分别实现了9%和12.6%的改进。它还在各种算法和任务中表现出鲁棒性和泛化性。

title: KFCPO: Kronecker-Factored Approximated Constrained Policy Optimization
summary: We propose KFCPO, a novel Safe Reinforcement Learning (Safe RL) algorithm that combines scalable Kronecker-Factored Approximate Curvature (K-FAC) based second-order policy optimization with safety-aware gradient manipulation. KFCPO leverages K-FAC to perform efficient and stable natural gradient updates by approximating the Fisher Information Matrix (FIM) in a layerwise, closed form manner, avoiding iterative approximation overheads. To address the tradeoff between reward maximization and constraint satisfaction, we introduce a margin aware gradient manipulation mechanism that adaptively adjusts the influence of reward and cost gradients based on the agent's proximity to safety boundaries. This method blends gradients using a direction sensitive projection, eliminating harmful interference and avoiding abrupt changes caused by fixed hard thresholds. Additionally, a minibatch level KL rollback strategy is adopted to ensure trust region compliance and to prevent destabilizing policy shifts. Experiments on Safety Gymnasium using OmniSafe show that KFCPO achieves 10.3% to 50.2% higher average return across environments compared to the best baseline that respected the safety constraint, demonstrating superior balance of safety and performance.
tldr: The paper introduces KFCPO, a safe reinforcement learning algorithm using Kronecker-Factored Approximate Curvature and safety-aware gradient manipulation, achieving superior performance and safety balance compared to baselines on Safety Gymnasium.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了KFCPO，一种使用Kronecker-Factored近似曲率和安全感知梯度操纵的安全强化学习算法，与Safety Gymnasium上的基线相比，实现了卓越的性能和安全平衡。
summary_zh: 我们提出KFCPO，一种新型的安全强化学习（Safe RL）算法，它结合了基于可扩展克罗内克因子近似曲率（K-FAC）的二阶策略优化与安全感知梯度操控。KFCPO利用K-FAC通过逐层闭式地近似费舍尔信息矩阵（FIM），来执行高效且稳定的自然梯度更新，避免了迭代近似的开销。为了解决奖励最大化和约束满足之间的权衡，我们引入了一种边际感知梯度操控机制，该机制根据智能体与安全边界的接近程度自适应地调整奖励和成本梯度的影响。该方法使用方向敏感的投影来混合梯度，消除了有害的干扰并避免了由固定硬阈值引起的突变。此外，采用了小批量级别的KL回滚策略，以确保置信域的约束并防止破坏稳定的策略转移。使用OmniSafe在Safety Gymnasium进行实验表明，与尊重安全约束的最佳基线相比，KFCPO在各种环境中实现了10.3%到50.2%的平均回报提升，展示了在安全性和性能之间的卓越平衡。

title: Occlusion-Aware Diffusion Model for Pedestrian Intention Prediction
summary: Predicting pedestrian crossing intentions is crucial for the navigation of mobile robots and intelligent vehicles. Although recent deep learning-based models have shown significant success in forecasting intentions, few consider incomplete observation under occlusion scenarios. To tackle this challenge, we propose an Occlusion-Aware Diffusion Model (ODM) that reconstructs occluded motion patterns and leverages them to guide future intention prediction. During the denoising stage, we introduce an occlusion-aware diffusion transformer architecture to estimate noise features associated with occluded patterns, thereby enhancing the model's ability to capture contextual relationships in occluded semantic scenarios. Furthermore, an occlusion mask-guided reverse process is introduced to effectively utilize observation information, reducing the accumulation of prediction errors and enhancing the accuracy of reconstructed motion features. The performance of the proposed method under various occlusion scenarios is comprehensively evaluated and compared with existing methods on popular benchmarks, namely PIE and JAAD. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves more robust performance than existing methods in the literature.
tldr: This paper introduces an Occlusion-Aware Diffusion Model (ODM) for predicting pedestrian crossing intentions, specifically addressing challenges posed by occlusions. The ODM reconstructs occluded motion patterns using an occlusion-aware diffusion transformer and mask-guided reverse process, achieving robust performance on standard benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于预测行人过马路意图的遮挡感知扩散模型（ODM），专门解决遮挡带来的挑战。ODM使用遮挡感知扩散Transformer和掩码引导的反向过程重建遮挡的运动模式，并在标准基准测试中实现了稳健的性能。
summary_zh: 预测行人横穿意图对于移动机器人和智能车辆的导航至关重要。尽管最近基于深度学习的模型在预测意图方面取得了显著成功，但鲜有考虑遮挡场景下的不完全观测。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种遮挡感知扩散模型（ODM），该模型重建被遮挡的运动模式，并利用它们来指导未来的意图预测。在去噪阶段，我们引入了一种遮挡感知扩散Transformer架构，以估计与被遮挡模式相关的噪声特征，从而增强模型在被遮挡语义场景中捕获上下文关系的能力。此外，引入了一种遮挡掩码引导的反向过程，以有效利用观测信息，减少预测误差的累积，并提高重建运动特征的准确性。我们对所提出的方法在各种遮挡场景下的性能进行了全面评估，并将其与流行基准数据集PIE和JAAD上的现有方法进行了比较。大量的实验结果表明，与文献中的现有方法相比，所提出的方法实现了更稳健的性能。

title: GraphGeo: Multi-Agent Debate Framework for Visual Geo-localization with Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks
summary: Visual geo-localization requires extensive geographic knowledge and sophisticated reasoning to determine image locations without GPS metadata. Traditional retrieval methods are constrained by database coverage and quality. Recent Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) enable direct location reasoning from image content, yet individual models struggle with diverse geographic regions and complex scenes. Existing multi-agent systems improve performance through model collaboration but treat all agent interactions uniformly. They lack mechanisms to handle conflicting predictions effectively. We propose \textbf{GraphGeo}, a multi-agent debate framework using heterogeneous graph neural networks for visual geo-localization. Our approach models diverse debate relationships through typed edges, distinguishing supportive collaboration, competitive argumentation, and knowledge transfer. We introduce a dual-level debate mechanism combining node-level refinement and edge-level argumentation modeling. A cross-level topology refinement strategy enables co-evolution between graph structure and agent representations. Experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate GraphGeo significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Our framework transforms cognitive conflicts between agents into enhanced geo-localization accuracy through structured debate.
tldr: The paper introduces GraphGeo, a multi-agent debate framework utilizing heterogeneous graph neural networks for improved visual geo-localization by modeling diverse agent interactions and handling conflicting predictions effectively.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了GraphGeo，一个多智能体辩论框架，它利用异构图神经网络改进视觉地理定位，通过对不同的智能体交互进行建模并有效地处理冲突预测。
summary_zh: 视觉地理定位需要在缺乏GPS元数据的情况下，凭借广泛的地理知识和复杂的推理来确定图像的位置。 传统的检索方法受限于数据库的覆盖范围和质量。 近年来，大型视觉-语言模型(LVLMs)能够直接从图像内容进行位置推理，但单个模型难以应对不同的地理区域和复杂场景。 现有的多智能体系统通过模型协作来提高性能，但它们对所有的智能体交互都采取统一的处理方式，缺乏有效处理冲突预测的机制。 我们提出了 \textbf{GraphGeo}，一种使用异构图神经网络的多智能体辩论框架，用于视觉地理定位。 我们的方法通过类型化的边来建模多样的辩论关系，区分了支持性的协作、竞争性的论证和知识转移. 我们引入了一种双层辩论机制，结合了节点级的细化和边级的论证建模。 一个跨层拓扑细化策略实现了图结构和智能体表征之间的协同进化。 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，GraphGeo显著优于最先进的方法。 我们的框架将智能体之间的认知冲突转化为增强的地理定位精度，通过结构化的辩论方式实现。

title: What's the next frontier for Data-centric AI? Data Savvy Agents
summary: The recent surge in AI agents that autonomously communicate, collaborate with humans and use diverse tools has unlocked promising opportunities in various real-world settings. However, a vital aspect remains underexplored: how agents handle data. Scalable autonomy demands agents that continuously acquire, process, and evolve their data. In this paper, we argue that data-savvy capabilities should be a top priority in the design of agentic systems to ensure reliable real-world deployment. Specifically, we propose four key capabilities to realize this vision: (1) Proactive data acquisition: enabling agents to autonomously gather task-critical knowledge or solicit human input to address data gaps; (2) Sophisticated data processing: requiring context-aware and flexible handling of diverse data challenges and inputs; (3) Interactive test data synthesis: shifting from static benchmarks to dynamically generated interactive test data for agent evaluation; and (4) Continual adaptation: empowering agents to iteratively refine their data and background knowledge to adapt to shifting environments. While current agent research predominantly emphasizes reasoning, we hope to inspire a reflection on the role of data-savvy agents as the next frontier in data-centric AI.
tldr: This paper argues that future AI agents need to be more 'data-savvy' by focusing on proactive data acquisition, sophisticated data processing, interactive test data synthesis, and continual adaptation, shifting the focus from pure reasoning.
tldr_zh: 该论文认为，未来的AI Agent需要更具“数据意识”，通过关注主动数据获取、复杂数据处理、交互式测试数据合成和持续适应，将重点从纯粹的推理转移。
summary_zh: 近年来，能够自主沟通、与人类协作并使用各种工具的AI Agent数量激增，为各种现实场景带来了充满希望的机遇。然而，一个关键方面仍未被充分探索：Agent如何处理数据。 可扩展的自主性要求Agent能够持续获取、处理和演化其数据。在本文中，我们认为，数据相关的能力应该是Agent系统设计的首要任务，以确保可靠的现实部署。具体而言，我们提出了四个关键能力来实现这一愿景：（1）主动数据获取：使Agent能够自主收集任务关键知识或征求人类输入，以解决数据缺口；（2）复杂数据处理：需要对各种数据挑战和输入进行上下文感知和灵活的处理；（3）交互式测试数据合成：从静态基准测试转向动态生成的交互式测试数据，用于Agent评估；（4）持续适应：使Agent能够迭代地改进其数据和背景知识，以适应不断变化的环境。虽然当前 Agent 研究主要强调推理，但我们希望启发人们反思数据感知 Agent 的作用，将其视为以数据为中心的人工智能的下一个前沿。

title: Equilibrium Policy Generalization: A Reinforcement Learning Framework for Cross-Graph Zero-Shot Generalization in Pursuit-Evasion Games
summary: Equilibrium learning in adversarial games is an important topic widely examined in the fields of game theory and reinforcement learning (RL). Pursuit-evasion game (PEG), as an important class of real-world games from the fields of robotics and security, requires exponential time to be accurately solved. When the underlying graph structure varies, even the state-of-the-art RL methods require recomputation or at least fine-tuning, which can be time-consuming and impair real-time applicability. This paper proposes an Equilibrium Policy Generalization (EPG) framework to effectively learn a generalized policy with robust cross-graph zero-shot performance. In the context of PEGs, our framework is generally applicable to both pursuer and evader sides in both no-exit and multi-exit scenarios. These two generalizability properties, to our knowledge, are the first to appear in this domain. The core idea of the EPG framework is to train an RL policy across different graph structures against the equilibrium policy for each single graph. To construct an equilibrium oracle for single-graph policies, we present a dynamic programming (DP) algorithm that provably generates pure-strategy Nash equilibrium with near-optimal time complexity. To guarantee scalability with respect to pursuer number, we further extend DP and RL by designing a grouping mechanism and a sequence model for joint policy decomposition, respectively. Experimental results show that, using equilibrium guidance and a distance feature proposed for cross-graph PEG training, the EPG framework guarantees desirable zero-shot performance in various unseen real-world graphs. Besides, when trained under an equilibrium heuristic proposed for the graphs with exits, our generalized pursuer policy can even match the performance of the fine-tuned policies from the state-of-the-art PEG methods.
tldr: This paper introduces an Equilibrium Policy Generalization (EPG) framework for reinforcement learning in pursuit-evasion games, enabling zero-shot cross-graph generalization by training against equilibrium policies and using a dynamic programming algorithm for equilibrium oracle construction.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一个均衡策略泛化（EPG）框架，用于追逐-逃避博弈中的强化学习，通过对抗均衡策略进行训练并利用动态规划算法构建均衡预言机，从而实现零样本跨图泛化。
summary_zh: 对抗博弈中的均衡学习是博弈论和强化学习（RL）领域广泛研究的重要课题。追逐规避博弈(PEG)作为机器人学和安全领域中一类重要的现实世界博弈，需要指数时间才能被精确求解。当底层图结构发生变化时，即使是最先进的强化学习方法也需要重新计算或至少进行微调，这可能非常耗时并损害实时应用性。本文提出了一种均衡策略泛化（EPG）框架，以有效地学习具有鲁棒跨图零样本性能的泛化策略。在追逐规避博弈的背景下，我们的框架通常适用于无出口和多出口场景中的追逐者和逃避者。据我们所知，这两个泛化属性是首次在该领域出现。 EPG框架的核心思想是在不同的图结构上，针对每个单图的均衡策略训练一个强化学习策略。为了为单图策略构造一个均衡预言机，我们提出了一种动态规划（DP）算法，该算法可以被证明以接近最优的时间复杂度生成纯策略纳什均衡。为了保证关于追逐者数量的可扩展性，我们进一步设计了策略分解的分组机制和序列模型，分别扩展了动态规划和强化学习。实验结果表明，通过使用均衡指导和为跨图追逐规避博弈训练提出的距离特征， EPG框架保证了在各种未见的现实世界图中的理想零样本性能。此外，当在为有出口的图设计的均衡启发式方法下训练时，我们的广义追逐者策略甚至可以与来自最先进追逐规避博弈方法的微调策略的性能相匹配。

title: Class-agnostic 3D Segmentation by Granularity-Consistent Automatic 2D Mask Tracking
summary: 3D instance segmentation is an important task for real-world applications. To avoid costly manual annotations, existing methods have explored generating pseudo labels by transferring 2D masks from foundation models to 3D. However, this approach is often suboptimal since the video frames are processed independently. This causes inconsistent segmentation granularity and conflicting 3D pseudo labels, which degrades the accuracy of final segmentation. To address this, we introduce a Granularity-Consistent automatic 2D Mask Tracking approach that maintains temporal correspondences across frames, eliminating conflicting pseudo labels. Combined with a three-stage curriculum learning framework, our approach progressively trains from fragmented single-view data to unified multi-view annotations, ultimately globally coherent full-scene supervision. This structured learning pipeline enables the model to progressively expose to pseudo-labels of increasing consistency. Thus, we can robustly distill a consistent 3D representation from initially fragmented and contradictory 2D priors. Experimental results demonstrated that our method effectively generated consistent and accurate 3D segmentations. Furthermore, the proposed method achieved state-of-the-art results on standard benchmarks and open-vocabulary ability.
tldr: This paper introduces a method for class-agnostic 3D instance segmentation by using granularity-consistent 2D mask tracking and a curriculum learning framework to generate and refine 3D pseudo-labels from 2D foundation models, achieving state-of-the-art results.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种类无关的3D实例分割方法，通过使用粒度一致的2D掩码跟踪和一个课程学习框架，从2D基础模型生成和细化3D伪标签，从而实现了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 3D实例分割是现实世界应用中的一项重要任务。为了避免昂贵的人工标注，现有方法探索了通过将基础模型的2D掩码转移到3D来生成伪标签。然而，这种方法通常并非最优，因为视频帧是独立处理的。这导致分割粒度不一致以及冲突的3D伪标签，从而降低了最终分割的准确性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种粒度一致的自动2D掩码跟踪方法，该方法保持了跨帧的时间对应关系，消除了冲突的伪标签。结合三阶段课程学习框架，我们的方法逐步地从碎片化的单视角数据训练到统一的多视角标注，最终实现全局一致的完整场景监督。这种结构化的学习流程使模型能够逐步接触到一致性递增的伪标签。因此，我们可以从最初碎片化和矛盾的2D先验中稳健地提取一致的3D表示。实验结果表明，我们的方法有效地生成了一致且准确的3D分割结果。此外，所提出的方法在标准基准测试和开放词汇能力方面均取得了最先进的结果。

title: Layer-Wise Modality Decomposition for Interpretable Multimodal Sensor Fusion
summary: In autonomous driving, transparency in the decision-making of perception models is critical, as even a single misperception can be catastrophic. Yet with multi-sensor inputs, it is difficult to determine how each modality contributes to a prediction because sensor information becomes entangled within the fusion network. We introduce Layer-Wise Modality Decomposition (LMD), a post-hoc, model-agnostic interpretability method that disentangles modality-specific information across all layers of a pretrained fusion model. To our knowledge, LMD is the first approach to attribute the predictions of a perception model to individual input modalities in a sensor-fusion system for autonomous driving. We evaluate LMD on pretrained fusion models under camera-radar, camera-LiDAR, and camera-radar-LiDAR settings for autonomous driving. Its effectiveness is validated using structured perturbation-based metrics and modality-wise visual decompositions, demonstrating practical applicability to interpreting high-capacity multimodal architectures. Code is available at https://github.com/detxter-jvb/Layer-Wise-Modality-Decomposition.
tldr: The paper presents Layer-Wise Modality Decomposition (LMD), a model-agnostic interpretability method for multimodal sensor fusion networks in autonomous driving, enabling attribution of predictions to individual input modalities at each layer.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为层级模态分解 (LMD) 的模型无关可解释性方法，用于自动驾驶中的多模态传感器融合网络，可以实现将预测归因于每一层的各个输入模态。
summary_zh: 在自动驾驶中，感知模型决策的透明性至关重要，因为即使是单个误判也可能造成灾难性后果。然而，由于多传感器输入，确定每种模态对预测的贡献度十分困难，因为传感器信息在融合网络中变得纠缠不清。我们提出层级模态分解（LMD），一种事后、模型无关的可解释性方法，用于解耦预训练融合模型所有层中的模态特定信息。据我们所知，LMD是首个将感知模型的预测归因于自动驾驶传感器融合系统中各个输入模态的方法。我们针对自动驾驶场景下使用摄像头-雷达、摄像头-激光雷达和摄像头-雷达-激光雷达设置的预训练融合模型评估了LMD。其有效性通过基于结构化扰动的指标和模态分解可视化进行了验证，证明了其在解释高容量多模态架构方面的实际适用性。代码可在https://github.com/detxter-jvb/Layer-Wise-Modality-Decomposition获取。

title: None To Optima in Few Shots: Bayesian Optimization with MDP Priors
summary: Bayesian Optimization (BO) is an efficient tool for optimizing black-box functions, but its theoretical guarantees typically hold in the asymptotic regime. In many critical real-world applications such as drug discovery or materials design, where each evaluation can be very costly and time-consuming, BO becomes impractical for many evaluations. In this paper, we introduce the Procedure-inFormed BO (ProfBO) algorithm, which solves black-box optimization with remarkably few function evaluations. At the heart of our algorithmic design are Markov Decision Process (MDP) priors that model optimization trajectories from related source tasks, thereby capturing procedural knowledge on efficient optimization. We embed these MDP priors into a prior-fitted neural network and employ model-agnostic meta-learning for fast adaptation to new target tasks. Experiments on real-world Covid and Cancer benchmarks and hyperparameter tuning tasks demonstrate that ProfBO consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods by achieving high-quality solutions with significantly fewer evaluations, making it ready for practical deployment.
tldr: The paper introduces ProfBO, a Bayesian Optimization algorithm leveraging MDP priors learned from related tasks to achieve efficient black-box optimization with few evaluations, demonstrating superior performance on real-world benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ProfBO，一种贝叶斯优化算法，它利用从相关任务中学习的MDP先验知识，以极少的评估次数实现高效的黑盒优化，并在真实世界的benchmark上表现出卓越的性能。
summary_zh: 贝叶斯优化（BO）是优化黑盒函数的一种有效工具，但其理论保证通常在渐近状态下成立。在许多关键的现实应用中，例如药物发现或材料设计，每次评估都可能非常昂贵且耗时，BO对于多次评估变得不切实际。在本文中，我们介绍了一种过程信息贝叶斯优化（ProfBO）算法，该算法以极少的函数评估次数解决黑盒优化问题。我们算法设计的核心是马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）先验，该先验对来自相关源任务的优化轨迹进行建模，从而捕获高效优化的程序知识。我们将这些MDP先验嵌入到先验拟合的神经网络中，并采用模型无关的元学习来实现对新目标任务的快速适应。在真实的Covid和癌症基准以及超参数调优任务上的实验表明，ProfBO始终优于最先进的方法，通过显著减少评估次数来实现高质量的解决方案，使其可以用于实际部署。

title: pacSTL: PAC-Bounded Signal Temporal Logic from Data-Driven Reachability Analysis
summary: Real-world robotic systems must comply with safety requirements in the presence of uncertainty. To define and measure requirement adherence, Signal Temporal Logic (STL) offers a mathematically rigorous and expressive language. However, standard STL cannot account for uncertainty. We address this problem by presenting pacSTL, a framework that combines Probably Approximately Correct (PAC) bounded set predictions with an interval extension of STL through optimization problems on the atomic proposition level. pacSTL provides PAC-bounded robustness intervals on the specification level that can be utilized in monitoring. We demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach through maritime navigation and analyze the efficiency and scalability of pacSTL through simulation and real-world experimentation on model vessels.
tldr: The paper introduces pacSTL, a framework combining PAC-bounded set predictions with Signal Temporal Logic to handle uncertainty in robotic systems for safety-critical tasks, demonstrating its effectiveness in maritime navigation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为pacSTL的框架，它结合了PAC边界集合预测与信号时序逻辑，以处理机器人系统中安全关键任务中的不确定性，并在海上导航中展示了其有效性。
summary_zh: 现实世界中的机器人系统必须在存在不确定性的情况下遵守安全要求。为了定义和衡量对要求的遵守程度，信号时序逻辑（STL）提供了一种数学上严谨且富有表现力的语言。然而，标准的STL无法处理不确定性。我们通过提出pacSTL来解决这个问题，pacSTL是一个框架，它结合了可能的近似正确（PAC）有界集合预测与STL的区间扩展，并通过原子命题层面的优化问题来实现。pacSTL在规范层面提供PAC有界鲁棒性区间，可在监控中使用。我们通过海上导航演示了这种方法的有效性，并通过模型船的仿真和真实实验分析了pacSTL的效率和可扩展性。

title: RefVTON: person-to-person Try on with Additional Unpaired Visual Reference
summary: We introduce RefTON, a flux-based person-to-person virtual try-on framework that enhances garment realism through unpaired visual references. Unlike conventional approaches that rely on complex auxiliary inputs such as body parsing and warped mask or require finely designed extract branches to process various input conditions, RefTON streamlines the process by directly generating try-on results from a source image and a target garment, without the need for structural guidance or auxiliary components to handle diverse inputs. Moreover, inspired by human clothing selection behavior, RefTON leverages additional reference images (the target garment worn on different individuals) to provide powerful guidance for refining texture alignment and maintaining the garment details. To enable this capability, we built a dataset containing unpaired reference images for training. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate that RefTON achieves competitive or superior performance compared to state-of-the-art methods, while maintaining a simple and efficient person-to-person design.
tldr: RefVTON introduces a simplified person-to-person virtual try-on framework using unpaired visual references for enhanced garment realism, outperforming existing methods with a more efficient design.
tldr_zh: RefVTON 提出了一种简化的基于人物的虚拟试穿框架，它使用非配对的视觉参考来增强服装的真实感，并以更高效的设计优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 我们提出了RefTON，一个基于光流的端到端虚拟试穿框架，它通过非配对视觉参考增强服装的真实感。与依赖于复杂辅助输入（如人体解析和扭曲掩膜）或需要精心设计的提取分支来处理各种输入条件的传统方法不同，RefTON简化了流程，直接从源图像和目标服装生成试穿结果，无需结构指导或辅助组件来处理多样化的输入。此外，受到人类服装选择行为的启发，RefTON利用额外的参考图像（不同个体穿着目标服装的照片）为优化纹理对齐和保持服装细节提供强有力的指导。为了支持这一能力，我们构建了一个包含非配对参考图像的数据集用于训练。在公共基准测试上的大量实验表明，RefTON在保持简单高效的端到端设计的同时，实现了与最先进方法相比具有竞争力或更优越的性能。

title: Towards classification-based representation learning for place recognition on LiDAR scans
summary: Place recognition is a crucial task in autonomous driving, allowing vehicles to determine their position using sensor data. While most existing methods rely on contrastive learning, we explore an alternative approach by framing place recognition as a multi-class classification problem. Our method assigns discrete location labels to LiDAR scans and trains an encoder-decoder model to classify each scan's position directly. We evaluate this approach on the NuScenes dataset and show that it achieves competitive performance compared to contrastive learning-based methods while offering advantages in training efficiency and stability.
tldr: This paper explores a classification-based approach for place recognition using LiDAR scans, offering a computationally efficient alternative to contrastive learning methods and demonstrating competitive performance on the NuScenes dataset.
tldr_zh: 本文探索了一种基于分类的激光雷达扫描图位置识别方法，它为对比学习方法提供了一种计算效率更高的替代方案，并在NuScenes数据集上展示了具有竞争力的性能。
summary_zh: 位置识别是自动驾驶中的一项关键任务，它使车辆能够使用传感器数据确定自身位置。虽然大多数现有方法依赖于对比学习，但我们探索了一种替代方案，将位置识别定义为一个多类分类问题。我们的方法为激光雷达扫描分配离散位置标签，并训练一个编码器-解码器模型来直接分类每个扫描的位置。我们在NuScenes数据集上评估了这种方法，并表明与基于对比学习的方法相比，它取得了具有竞争力的性能，同时在训练效率和稳定性方面具有优势。

title: Been There, Scanned That: Nostalgia-Driven LiDAR Compression for Self-Driving Cars
summary: An autonomous vehicle can generate several terabytes of sensor data per day. A significant portion of this data consists of 3D point clouds produced by depth sensors such as LiDARs. This data must be transferred to cloud storage, where it is utilized for training machine learning models or conducting analyses, such as forensic investigations in the event of an accident. To reduce network and storage costs, this paper introduces DejaView. Although prior work uses interframe redundancies to compress data, DejaView searches for and uses redundancies on larger temporal scales (days and months) for more effective compression. We designed DejaView with the insight that the operating area of autonomous vehicles is limited and that vehicles mostly traverse the same routes daily. Consequently, the 3D data they collect daily is likely similar to the data they have captured in the past. To capture this, the core of DejaView is a diff operation that compactly represents point clouds as delta w.r.t. 3D data from the past. Using two months of LiDAR data, an end-to-end implementation of DejaView can compress point clouds by a factor of 210 at a reconstruction error of only 15 cm.
tldr: The paper introduces DejaView, a LiDAR compression technique for self-driving cars that leverages temporal redundancy over days/months instead of frames, achieving a compression factor of 210 with low error.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了DejaView，一种用于自动驾驶汽车的激光雷达压缩技术，它利用数天/数月的时序冗余而非帧间的冗余，实现了210倍的压缩率，且误差较低。
summary_zh: 自动驾驶车辆每天可以生成数TB的传感器数据。其中很大一部分数据是由激光雷达等深度传感器产生的3D点云。这些数据必须传输到云存储，用于训练机器学习模型或进行分析，例如在发生事故时进行取证调查。为了降低网络和存储成本，本文介绍了DejaView。 虽然先前的工作利用帧间冗余来压缩数据，但DejaView搜索并利用更大时间尺度（天和月）上的冗余，以实现更有效的压缩。 我们设计DejaView的洞察是，自动驾驶车辆的运行区域是有限的，并且车辆主要每天行驶相同的路线。 因此，它们每天收集的3D数据可能与过去捕获的数据相似。 为了捕捉到这一点，DejaView的核心是一种差异操作，它将点云紧凑地表示为与过去3D数据的delta。 使用两个月的激光雷达数据，DejaView的端到端实现可以在仅 15 厘米的重建误差下，将点云压缩 210 倍。

title: FeNN-DMA: A RISC-V SoC for SNN acceleration
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are a promising, energy-efficient alternative to standard Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) and are particularly well-suited to spatio-temporal tasks such as keyword spotting and video classification. However, SNNs have a much lower arithmetic intensity than ANNs and are therefore not well-matched to standard accelerators like GPUs and TPUs. Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) are designed for such memory-bound workloads, and here we present a novel, fully-programmable RISC-V-based system-on-chip (FeNN-DMA), tailored to simulating SNNs on modern UltraScale+ FPGAs. We show that FeNN-DMA has comparable resource usage and energy requirements to state-of-the-art fixed-function SNN accelerators, yet it supports more complex neuron models and network topologies, and can simulate up to 16 thousand neurons and 256 million synapses per core. Using this functionality, we demonstrate state-of-the-art classification accuracy on the Spiking Heidelberg Digits, Neuromorphic MNIST and Braille tactile classification tasks.
tldr: The paper introduces FeNN-DMA, a RISC-V-based SoC on an FPGA designed for efficient SNN simulation, achieving comparable performance to fixed-function accelerators while supporting more complex models and topologies and demonstrating strong results on benchmark datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种基于RISC-V的片上系统FeNN-DMA，它在FPGA上设计用于高效的SNN仿真。它在支持更复杂的模型和拓扑的同时，性能与固定功能加速器相当，并在基准数据集上展示了强大的结果。
summary_zh: 脉冲神经网络 (SNN) 是标准人工神经网络 (ANN) 的一种极具前景的、节能的替代方案，尤其适用于时空任务，如关键词识别和视频分类。然而，SNN 的算术密度远低于 ANN，因此与 GPU 和 TPU 等标准加速器并不匹配。现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 专为这种内存受限的工作负载而设计，在此我们提出一种新型的、完全可编程的基于 RISC-V 的片上系统 (FeNN-DMA)，专门用于在现代 UltraScale+ FPGA 上模拟 SNN。我们表明，FeNN-DMA 在资源使用和能源需求方面与最先进的固定功能 SNN 加速器相当，但它支持更复杂的神经元模型和网络拓扑，并且每个内核可以模拟多达 1.6 万个神经元和 2.56 亿个突触。利用此功能，我们在 Spiking Heidelberg Digits、Neuromorphic MNIST 和 Braille 触觉分类任务上展示了最先进的分类精度。

title: Lifted Successor Generation in Numeric Planning
summary: Most planners ground numeric planning tasks, given in a first-order-like language, into a ground task representation. However, this can lead to an exponential blowup in task representation size, which occurs in practice for hard-to-ground tasks. We extend a state-of-the-art lifted successor generator for classical planning to support numeric precondition applicability. The method enumerates maximum cliques in a substitution consistency graph. Each maximum clique represents a substitution for the variables of the action schema, yielding a ground action. We augment this graph with numeric action preconditions and prove the successor generator is exact under formally specified conditions. When the conditions fail, our generator may list inapplicable ground actions; a final applicability check filters these without affecting completeness. However, this cannot happen in 23 of 25 benchmark domains, and it occurs only in 1 domain. To the authors' knowledge, no other lifted successor generator supports numeric action preconditions. This enables future research on lifted planning for a very rich planning fragment.
tldr: This paper introduces a lifted successor generator for numeric planning, extending existing methods for classical planning to handle numeric preconditions, potentially avoiding exponential blowup in task representation size.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于数值规划的提升后继生成器，扩展了现有的经典规划方法以处理数值前提条件，从而可能避免任务表示大小的指数级增长。
summary_zh: 大多数规划器将用类一阶语言描述的数值规划任务转化为固化的任务表示。然而，这会导致任务表示规模呈指数级膨胀，这种情况在实践中对于难以固化的任务会发生。我们扩展了用于经典规划的最先进的提升后继状态生成器，以支持数值前置条件的适用性。该方法枚举替换一致性图中的最大团。每个最大团代表动作模式中变量的一个替换，从而产生一个固化的动作。我们使用数值动作前置条件来增强这个图，并证明在正式指定的条件下，后继状态生成器是精确的。当条件失效时，我们的生成器可能会列出不适用的固化动作；最终的适用性检查会过滤掉这些动作，而不会影响完整性。然而，这种情况在25个基准测试领域中的23个领域里都不会发生，并且只在一个领域中发生。据作者所知，没有其他提升的后继状态生成器支持数值动作前置条件。这为未来对非常丰富的规划片段进行提升规划的研究提供了可能。

title: A Hybrid YOLOv5-SSD IoT-Based Animal Detection System for Durian Plantation Protection
summary: Durian plantation suffers from animal intrusions that cause crop damage and financial loss. The traditional farming practices prove ineffective due to the unavailability of monitoring without human intervention. The fast growth of machine learning and Internet of Things (IoT) technology has led to new ways to detect animals. However, current systems are limited by dependence on single object detection algorithms, less accessible notification platforms, and limited deterrent mechanisms. This research suggests an IoT-enabled animal detection system for durian crops. The system integrates YOLOv5 and SSD object detection algorithms to improve detection accuracy. The system provides real-time monitoring, with detected intrusions automatically reported to farmers via Telegram notifications for rapid response. An automated sound mechanism (e.g., tiger roar) is triggered once the animal is detected. The YOLO+SSD model achieved accuracy rates of elephant, boar, and monkey at 90%, 85% and 70%, respectively. The system shows the highest accuracy in daytime and decreases at night, regardless of whether the image is still or a video. Overall, this study contributes a comprehensive and practical framework that combines detection, notification, and deterrence, paving the way for future innovations in automated farming solutions.
tldr: This paper presents an IoT-based animal detection system for durian plantations, using a hybrid YOLOv5-SSD model for real-time monitoring, Telegram notifications, and an automated sound deterrent to prevent crop damage.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于物联网的榴莲种植园动物检测系统，该系统采用混合YOLOv5-SSD模型进行实时监控，通过Telegram通知农民，并利用自动声音威慑来防止作物损失。
summary_zh: 榴莲种植受动物入侵影响，导致作物损失和经济损失。 传统的耕作方式由于缺乏人工干预的监测而无效。机器学习和物联网 (IoT) 技术的快速发展为检测动物提供了新的方法。 然而，目前的系统受到对单一目标检测算法的依赖、可访问性较差的通知平台以及有限的威慑机制的限制。 本研究提出了一种用于榴莲作物的基于物联网的动物检测系统。该系统集成了 YOLOv5 和 SSD 目标检测算法，以提高检测准确率。 该系统提供实时监控，检测到的入侵会自动通过 Telegram 通知报告给农民，以便快速响应。 一旦检测到动物，就会触发自动声音机制（例如老虎咆哮）。 YOLO+SSD 模型在识别大象、野猪和猴子方面的准确率分别达到 90%、85% 和 70%。 无论图像是静态的还是视频的，该系统在白天显示出最高的准确率，并在夜间下降。 总之，本研究贡献了一个全面的、实用的框架，该框架结合了检测、通知和威慑，为未来自动化耕作解决方案的创新铺平了道路。

title: Trust Region-Based Bayesian Optimisation to Discover Diverse Solutions
summary: Bayesian optimisation (BO) is a surrogate-based optimisation technique that efficiently solves expensive black-box functions with small evaluation budgets. Recent studies consider trust regions to improve the scalability of BO approaches when the problem space scales to more dimensions. Motivated by this research, we explore the effectiveness of trust region-based BO algorithms for diversity optimisation in different dimensional black box problems. We propose diversity optimisation approaches extending TuRBO1, which is the first BO method that uses a trust region-based approach for scalability. We extend TuRBO1 as divTuRBO1, which finds an optimal solution while maintaining a given distance threshold relative to a reference solution set. We propose two approaches to find diverse solutions for black-box functions by combining divTuRBO1 runs in a sequential and an interleaving fashion. We conduct experimental investigations on the proposed algorithms and compare their performance with that of the baseline method, ROBOT (rank-ordered Bayesian optimisation with trust regions). We evaluate proposed algorithms on benchmark functions with dimensions 2 to 20. Experimental investigations demonstrate that the proposed methods perform well, particularly in larger dimensions, even with a limited evaluation budget.
tldr: This paper introduces trust region-based Bayesian optimization approaches (divTuRBO1) for diversity optimization in black-box functions, showing good performance even in high-dimensional spaces with limited evaluation budgets.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于信任域的贝叶斯优化方法 (divTuRBO1)，用于在黑盒函数中实现多样性优化，即使在高维空间中，在评估预算有限的情况下，也表现出良好的性能。
summary_zh: 贝叶斯优化（BO）是一种基于代理模型的优化技术，能够以较小的评估预算高效地求解昂贵的黑盒函数。最近的研究考虑采用信任域来提高BO方法在问题空间扩展到更多维度时的可扩展性。受此研究的启发，我们探索了基于信任域的BO算法在不同维度黑盒问题中多样性优化方面的有效性。我们提出了多样性优化方法，扩展了TuRBO1，它是第一个使用基于信任域的方法来实现可扩展性的BO方法。我们扩展了TuRBO1为divTuRBO1，它在找到最优解的同时，保持相对于参考解集的给定距离阈值。我们提出了两种方法，通过以顺序和交织的方式组合divTuRBO1的运行，来寻找黑盒函数的多样化解。我们对所提出的算法进行了实验研究，并将其性能与基线方法ROBOT（基于排名的具有信任域的贝叶斯优化）的性能进行了比较。我们评估了提出的算法在维度为2到20的基准函数上的性能。实验研究表明，提出的方法表现良好，尤其是在更大的维度上，即使评估预算有限。
